description: [ELON] Generate migration to create shopify_credentials and shopify_orders tables with proper constraints, indexes, and foreign keys. Use BIGINT for price_cents to avoid floating point. Use JSONB for line_items_json. Add unique constraint on (shop_domain, order_number) for shopify_orders. Add unique constraint on (shop_domain, webhook_event_id) for idempotency.
successCriteria: Migration runs without errors on local database
Tables created with correct columns and types
Unique constraints enforced (test duplicate insert fails)
Indexes present (check with \d shopify_orders in psql)
